introSection: Flying School was a steel inverted roller coaster that previously operated at Legoland Florida in Winter Haven, Florida, USA. Before the park became Legoland, it was called Swamp Thing.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride opened as Swamp Thing in 2004 and was installed by Martin & Vleminckx. It closed in 2008, but reopened as part of Legoland Florida in 2011 as Flying School.

In July 2023, the park announced that the ride would permanently close on August 16, 2023. The ride was standing but not operating as of December 2023. It was demolished in 2024.

fullText:
Flying School was a steel inverted roller coaster that previously operated at Legoland Florida in Winter Haven, Florida, USA. Before the park became Legoland, it was called Swamp Thing.

The ride opened as Swamp Thing in 2004 and was installed by Martin & Vleminckx. It closed in 2008, but reopened as part of Legoland Florida in 2011 as Flying School.

In July 2023, the park announced that the ride would permanently close on August 16, 2023. The ride was standing but not operating as of December 2023. It was demolished in 2024.
